workflow.name: SDLC Optional Assessor Fails Required Pass
workflow.goal: Exercise a workflow where the required assessor passes but the instantiated optional assessor forces one rework cycle before release packaging.

parameters.change_request: Add a deterministic template preview command to the seeded CLI and verify with ./scripts/verify.sh.
parameters.optional_assessor_contract: Instantiate the optional security assessor. It must request changes until template access is constrained to repository-owned templates only.
parameters.initial_revision_scope: Revision 1 must intentionally leave template access insufficiently constrained so the optional assessor has a concrete finding.
parameters.rework_completion_scope: Revision 2 must constrain template access to repository-owned templates and reverify the workflow.

instructions.content: Keep the seeded Python CLI stack and verify with ./scripts/verify.sh.
